briefdescription.para: Fixed storage for one base code point and up to two combining marks.
The stored base and combining code points.
Construct an empty character.
Construct a character from a single code point.

parameterdescription.para: The Unicode code point to store as the base character.

briefdescription.para: Construct a character from UTF-8 text.

parameterdescription.para: The UTF-8 text for exactly one terminal character. Invalid UTF-8 bytes are replaced per byte, and unsupported text normalizes to U+FFFD. Empty input, control codes, and leading zero-width code points normalize to U+FFFD. Later visible code points also collapse the result to U+FFFD, while a third combining mark is ignored.

briefdescription.para: Construct a character from UTF-32 text.

parameterdescription.para: The UTF-32 text for exactly one terminal character. Invalid Unicode scalar values and unsupported text normalize to U+FFFD. Empty input, control codes, and leading zero-width code points normalize to U+FFFD. Later visible code points also collapse the result to U+FFFD, while a third combining mark is ignored.

briefdescription.para: Compare two stored character sequences.
Compare two stored character sequences.
Compare against a single code point.
Compare against a single code point.
Convert the stored sequence to UTF-8.
Convert the stored sequence to UTF-32.
Get the leading code point.
Get a single Unicode code point or zero for combined or empty characters.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a fast-path method for comparing a single-code point character, without the color.
The single code point, or 0 if this character is combined or empty.

briefdescription.para: Get the raw stored code points.
Get the number of stored code points.
Get the terminal display width in cells.
Get the UTF-8 byte count for this sequence.
Append the UTF-8 representation to a buffer.
Create a copy with one additional combining code point.

parameterdescription.para: The combining code point to append.
How invalid combining code points are handled.

simplesect.para: The updated character. EncodingErrors::Replace and EncodingErrors::Ignore keep the original character unchanged for invalid combining code points or when the storage is already full.

parameterdescription.para: If encodingErrors is Throw and the code point is unsupported.

briefdescription.para: Test if the character is empty.
Test if the character is spacing.
Test if the leading code point is a control code.
Get a stable hash for the stored code points.
Parse exactly one visible text character from UTF-8 input.

detaileddescription.para:
Invalid or unsupported input normalizes to U+FFFD.
text
The UTF-8 text to parse.
The parsed character wrapped in std::optional for API compatibility. This function currently always returns a value and uses normalization instead of std::nullopt.

briefdescription.para: Parse exactly one visible text character from UTF-32 input.

detaileddescription.para:
Invalid or unsupported input normalizes to U+FFFD.
text
The UTF-32 text to parse.
The parsed character wrapped in std::optional for API compatibility. This function currently always returns a value and uses normalization instead of std::nullopt.

briefdescription.para: Test if a code point is a control code.
Test whether the code point is encoded as a standalone terminal character in text parsing.

memberdef.argsstring: (Storage &result, std::size_t &combiningCount, bool &hasBaseCodePoint, bool &mustReplace, char32_t codePoint) noexcept
memberdef.name: normalizeDecodedTextCodePoint

briefdescription.para: Internal representation of one terminal character with optional combining marks.
